name: Xero Customers and Suppliers
body: [{"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Import Customers and Suppliers from Xero"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Customers and suppliers can be imported from Xero into Neto by Maropost using the "}, {"text": "Import Customer Settings", "bold": true}, {"text": " in the Xero workflow. This will import any contacts from Xero that are set as a customer or supplier into Neto. Ensure your Xero contacts are correctly set as either customers or suppliers to ensure smooth operation."}]}, {"type": "blockquote", "children": [{"type": "blockquote-line", "children": [{"text": "Tip", "bold": true}, {"text": ": We recommend consulting your accountant or Xero specialist on the best way to flag contacts as Suppliers in Xero as part of your business processes."}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "These settings will import both customers and suppliers. You can turn either of the above imports off in the "}, {"text": "Xero", "bold": true}, {"text": " > "}, {"text": "Tasks", "bold": true}, {"text": " menu. Click on either the "}, {"text": "Import customer from Xero", "bold": true}, {"text": " or "}, {"text": "Import Suppliers from Xero", "bold": true}, {"text": " task IDs, and change their status to "}, {"text": "Inactive", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "blockquote", "children": [{"type": "blockquote-line", "children": [{"text": "Important", "bold": true}, {"text": ": Individual contacts or suppliers can\u2019t be excluded from the import, and will be re-imported if deleted from Neto."}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Customer Matching"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Neto\u00a0will match your Xero customers to existing Neto customers in one of two ways:"}]}, {"type": "table", "children": [{"type": "thead", "children": [{"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "th", "attributes": {"colspan": "1", "rowspan": "1"}, "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Neto\u00a0field(s)"}]}]}, {"type": "th", "attributes": {"colspan": "1", "rowspan": "1"}, "children": [{"text": "Xero field(s)"}]}]}]}, {"type": "tbody", "children": [{"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "attributes": {"colspan": "1", "rowspan": "1"}, "children": [{"text": "Email address"}]}, {"type": "td", "attributes": {"colspan": "1", "rowspan": "1"}, "children": [{"text": "Email address"}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "attributes": {"colspan": "1", "rowspan": "1"}, "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Company Name, First Name, and Last Name"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "attributes": {"colspan": "1", "rowspan": "1"}, "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Contact Name, First Name, and Last Name"}]}]}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Supplier Matching"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Suppliers match differently with customers. In Xero, the contact name of the supplier must match the supplier\u2019s "}, {"text": "Company", "bold": true}, {"text": " field in Neto."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Xero Contacts that are both Customers and Suppliers"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "When you have an Xero contact that is both a supplier and customer, extra steps need to be taken to ensure smooth operation. In these cases, update the customer in Neto so that the username matches the supplier ID."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}]
